notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Samad Taylor singles on a ground ball to shortstop Mauricio Dubón. Sung-Mun Song scores. Fernando Tatis Jr. scores. Samad Taylor to 2nd. Throwing error by shortstop Mauricio Dubón.

notableEvents.label: Ty France pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ty France pops out to first baseman Matt Olson.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Michael Harris II reaches on a fielding error by right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr. Michael Harris II to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Andujar pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar flies out to right fielder Eli White.

notableEvents.label: Manny Machado walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Manny Machado singles on a ground ball to center fielder Michael Harris II. Jackson Merrill scores.
